mechanism: The diagnostic settings policy initiative includes a DeployIfNotExists definition per approved resource type. Whitelisting a type requires adding a corresponding definition.
why: An approved resource type without a diagnostic settings definition has no telemetry and no remediation path — the coverage gap is silent.

related.note: Approved list and diagnostic settings initiative must stay in sync.
Must use a Config-prefixed assignment for diagnostic settings.

violations: Resource type added to allowedResources.json without a diagnostic settings definition.
Diagnostic settings definition for a type not on the approved list — dead configuration.
